CustomField.description: Sum of all the LLP template Cost Per Cycle value
CustomField.formula: if(isblank(leaseworks__Total_Cost__c) || leaseworks__Total_Cost__c==0 || isblank(leaseworks__Total_Cycle__c) || leaseworks__Total_Cycle__c==0 , null , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Cost_per_Cycle__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sum of all the LLP template Cost Per Cycle value.
CustomField.label: Cost Per Cycle
